title: Febreze Air Mist GOLD ORCHID LENOR 185ml – Pack of 6 | OdourClear™ Technology | Floral & Exotic Scent | Non-Flammable Room Freshener
features: 🌸 6 x 185ml Febreze Air Mist Gold Orchid Lenor – Luxury floral fragrance in a convenient multi-pack for whole-home freshness
💨 OdourClear Technology – Effectively eliminates tough odours instead of masking them for lasting freshness
🔥 Non-Flammable & Propellant-Free – Safe to use throughout your home, including kitchens and bathrooms
🏠 Versatile Room Freshener – Ideal for bedrooms, living areas, bathrooms, and offices
🇬🇧 Made in the UK by Procter & Gamble – Trusted quality and performance you can rely on
description: Enjoy the captivating scent of Febreze Air Mist Gold Orchid Lenor in this value pack of six 185ml cans. The luxurious floral blend combines golden orchid with exotic notes, creating a sophisticated and inviting atmosphere in any room. OdourClear Technology ensures odours are neutralised at their source, not just masked, for a truly fresh environment. Pack of 6 sprays – perfect for multiple rooms or long-term use Elegant floral and exotic fragrance for a premium scent experience Non-flammable and propellant-free for safe everyday use Ideal for use in homes, offices, and other indoor spaces Made in the UK by Procter & Gamble, ensuring consistent quality Febreze – freshness you can trust.
